goal: Phase 9-12 recovery-rate ablation; data-driven keep/drop of features/model/EV; aim for black-letter (recovery_rate>=1.25 after 20-25% deduction)

sanctuary.test_window: BT-1 fixed (§11.2); no test-outcome in training/threshold selection
sanctuary.safe01: features odds-free (no odds/market proxy in FEATURE_COLUMNS)
sanctuary.preregistration: this file committed before execution; off-spec additions recorded with reason
sanctuary.byte_reproducible: FIXED_REPRODUCE_TS, seed=42, num_threads=1, identical hyperparam; 2-run equality check
sanctuary.make_X_y_immutable: column-drop isolated in thin script via X.drop(); production FEATURE_COLUMNS assert untouched

metric_two_systems.note: 09-system and 12-system share the recovery_rate formula but differ in SELECTOR -> different selected sets -> NOT directly comparable

system_12.selector: EV_lower>=1.05 AND p>=0.15 AND odds>=1.5 AND top-2/race

metric_two_systems.decision: all variants measured with 12-system unified selector; 09-system numbers are selector-specific reference only

U0_gate.purpose: confirm selector divergence and migrate to 12-system unified metric
U0_gate.comparison: 12-system recovery_rate vs 09-system roi=0.7359; mismatch expected (confirms selector-specificity)
U0_gate.gate: 09-system numbers not directly comparable; remeasure A0-A3 with 12-system unified selector

B_model_ev.config: race-relative theta=1.0 point estimate (Phase 11 true effect, unknown)

matrix.E_optimal_subset: explore feature subsets from A-D results; rank by recovery_rate

implementation.column_drop: new scripts/run_ablation.py (thin script); make_X_y unchanged; X.drop(columns=group) inside script; reuse orchestrator split/calib/category_map/race_relative

execution_order: D1-D3 (if 9.1 degradation confirmed in unified metric) -> C1-C3 -> E -> B1
